normal_equation_cache.reuse: D, D^dagger, and D^dagger D are built once per needed mass/source per configuration and reused across point-source and stochastic RHS solves
normal_equation_cache.scope: per saved gauge configuration and smeared measurement gauge

fh_lsz_measurement_policy.strict_limit: Selected-mass source-coordinate FH/LSZ target time series are performance/instrumentation support only; they are not physical y_t evidence until canonical-Higgs/source-overlap or W/Z response identity gates close.

scalar_source_response_analysis.multi_tau_target_timeseries_rule: diagnostic per-configuration adjacent-time effective-energy slopes for response-window covariance gates; not a readout switch and not a physical dE/dh observable
scalar_source_response_analysis.source_coordinate: uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering the Dirac mass as m_bare + s
scalar_source_response_analysis.strict_limit: dE/ds is not dE/dh until kappa_s is derived by scalar LSZ/canonical normalization
scalar_source_response_analysis.target_timeseries_rule: diagnostic per-configuration tau=1 effective-energy slopes for autocorrelation/ESS gates; not a physical dE/dh readout

scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.estimator: Z2 stochastic trace estimator; production evidence requires saved ensembles and controlled statistics

noise_subsample_stability.strict_limit: Noise subsample stability is an estimator diagnostic only; it is not production evidence or scalar LSZ normalization without same-source production statistics and pole/FV/IR control.

scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.source_coordinate: same uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering m_bare + s
scalar_two_point_lsz_analysis.strict_limit: finite-mode stochastic C_ss(q) is not kappa_s until an isolated pole, dGamma/dp^2 at the pole, and canonical Higgs normalization are derived
